sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_elem: Combinational FP32-to-quantized integer element conversion using Q15 scale and zero-point with saturation to the quantized range.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational quantized-domain matrix multiply that subtracts zero-points and accumulates INT32 dot products.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequant_matrix: Combinational matrix dequantization from INT32 accumulators to packed IEEE-754 FP32 outputs using Q15 scale products.
